revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23985667504|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:比売許曽神社]] { { { {{Unreferenced needed|date=2018-04}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Himekoso Shrine | location = Higashinari-ku, Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture, Japan | ISO = JP-27 | LatitudeDeg = 34 | LatitudeMin = 40 | LatitudeSec = 1.3 | LongitudeDeg = 135 | LongitudeMin = 32 | LongitudeSec = 3.0 | LabelPosition = | Map = Osaka city | deity = {{ill|Shitateruhime|ja|シタテルヒメ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitateruhime|qq=}} | ShrineRank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} ({{ill|Myōjin-taisha|ja|名神大社|fr|Myōjin Taisha|zh|名神大社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōjin-taisha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Myōjin Taisha|qid=Q9610964}})
Former {{ill|Mura-sha|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mura-sha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}} | Establishment = 2nd year of Emperor Suinin's reign | AnnualFestival = October 15 | MainBuilding = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|en|Nagare-zukuri|qid=Q210684|lt=Nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Himekoso Shrine torii.jpeg | location = {{ill|Osaka|qid=Q35765|1=Osaka}} | coordinates = {{Coord|34.66702778|N|135.53416667|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | architecture_style = {{ill|nagare-zukuri|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} }} [[File:Himekoso-jinja, torii.jpg|thumb|220px|{{center|Torii Gate}}]] '''Himekoso Shrine''' (ひめこそじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Higashinari-ku, Osaka|en|Higashinari-ku, Osaka|qid=Q985701|lt=Higashinari-ku|1=Higashinari-ku, Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka|en|Osaka|qid=Q35765|lt=Osaka City|1=Osaka}}. The shrine was formerly classified as a {{ill|Mura-sha|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mura-sha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}} and is a proposed site of the {{ill|Shikinai Myōjin-taisha|ja|摂津国東生郡 比売許曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinai Myōjin-taisha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} mentioned in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} (another proposed site is the auxiliary shrine of {{ill|Kōzu-gū|en|Kōzu-gū|qid=Q11671792|lt=Kōzu-gū|1=Kōzu-gū}}). == Enshrined Deities == * Primary deity: {{ill|Shitateruhime|ja|シタテルヒメ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitateruhime|qq=}} * Other Deities: {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|en|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|Ajisukitakahikone|en|Ajisukitakahikone|qid=Q506610|lt=Ajisukitakahikone|1=Ajisukitakahikone}}, {{ill|Ōhashi-no-Mikoto|ja|大小橋命|1=Ōbashi no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōhashi-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōbashi no Mikoto|qq=}}, {{ill|Emperor Nintoku|en|Emperor Nintoku|qid=Q313119|lt=Emperor Nintoku|1=Emperor Nintoku}}, {{ill|Tachibana Toyohime|ja|橘豊日命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Toyohime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == History == According to shrine tradition, Himekoso Shrine was established in the 2nd year of Emperor Suinin's reign (7th month), originally located on Akume Hill (愛来目山) in present-day Kobashi-cho, Tennoji-ku, Osaka[https://www.city.osaka.lg.jp/higashinari/page/0000588014.html Higashinari Ward Homepage - Himekoso Shrine]. It was referred to as "Takatsu Tenjin" during its early history. The shrine's current location is attributed to reconstructions during the reign of Emperor Kenzo. In the {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|qid=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}}, the shrine is linked to Akaruhi-hime-no-Kami (阿加流比売神), a deity said to have come from {{ill|Silla|en|Silla|qid=Q28456|lt=Silla|1=Silla}}. However, the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|qid=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki|1=Nihon Shoki}} identifies a separate shrine for this deity in Sumiyoshi District. The Engishiki records identify Himekoso Shrine as a Myōjin-taisha[https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%AF%94%E5%A3%B2%E8%A8%B1%E6%9B%BE%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE-1400435#goog_rewarded Kotobank - Himekoso Shrine]. The shrine suffered destruction during the Siege of Osaka by {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} in the late 16th century. In the Edo period, Himekoso Shrine was reestablished based on recovered documents and artifacts. It was officially registered as a village shrine (Mura-sha) in 1872. == Features == * '''Main Hall (Honden)''' * '''Worship Hall (Haiden)''' * '''Treasure House''' * '''Shrine Office''' === Subsidiary Shrines === * Shiratama Inari Shrine * Ōkuninushi Shrine * Offsite Shrine: ** Ubuyu Inari Shrine: Believed to be the original location of Himekoso Shrine. == Cultural Properties == === Osaka City Designated Tangible Cultural Property === * Himekoso Shrine Documents: A collection of 52 items. == location == * A11ress: 3-8-14 Higashikobashi, Higashinari-ku, Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture, Japan. == Access == * 7-minute walk from {{ill|Tsuruhashi Station|en|Tsuruhashi Station|qid=Q1131704|lt=Tsuruhashi Station|1=Tsuruhashi Station}}, served by {{ill|Kintetsu Railway|en|Kintetsu Railway|qid=Q1531085|lt=Kintetsu Railway|1=Kintetsu Railway}}, {{ill|Osaka Loop Line|en|Osaka Loop Line|qid=Q1142127|lt=Osaka Loop Line|1=Osaka Loop Line}}, and {{ill|Osaka Metro|en|Osaka Metro|qid=Q51211653|lt=Osaka Metro|1=Osaka Metro (company)}}. == References == {{Reflist|2}} == See Also == * {{ill|Himekoso-sha|ja|比売語曽社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso-sha|qq=}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.osaka.lg.jp/higashinari/page/0000588014.html Higashinari Ward Homepage - Himekoso Shrine] {{Shinto horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|比売許曽神社|version=99674778|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]] ==Merged second translation== {{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売許曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=}} {{ill|Translated Shrines and Temples|ja|untranslated shrines and temples|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Translated Shrines and Temples|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{Source Citation|date=April 2018}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = Himekoso Shrine (比売許曽神社) | Location = {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}{{ill|Osaka|en|Osaka|qid=Q35765|lt=Osaka City|1=Osaka}}{{ill|Higashinari-ku, Osaka|en|Higashinari-ku, Osaka|qid=Q985701|lt=Higashinari Ward|1=Higashinari-ku, Osaka}}{{ill|Higashikobashi|ja|東小橋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higashikobashi|1=Higashi-obase|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q75223436}}3丁目8-14 | ISO = JP-27 | Latitude_deg = 34 | Latitude_min = 40 | Latitude_sec = 1.3 | Longitude_deg = 135 | Longitude_min = 32 | Longitude_sec = 3.0 | Label position = | Map = Osaka City | Deity = {{ill|Shitateruhime|ja|シタテルヒメ|lt=Lower Illumination Hime|lt_ja=下照比売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitateruhime|qq=}} | Shrine Rank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} ({{ill|Myoujin Taisha|ja|名神大社|lt=Myoujin Taisha|lt_ja=名神大|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myoujin Taisha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Myōjin Taisha|qid=Q9610964}})
Former {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}} | Founded = {{ill|Emperor Suinin|en|Emperor Suinin|qid=Q314850|lt=Emperor Suinin|1=Emperor Suinin}} 2nd year | Festival = {{ill|October 15|en|October 15|qid=Q2919|lt=October 15|1=October 15}} | Main Hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|en|Nagare-zukuri|qid=Q210684|lt=Nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} | image = [[File:Himekoso-jinja, haiden-1.jpg|280px]]
Worship Hall }} [[File:Himekoso-jinja, torii.jpg|thumb|220px|{{center|Torii (鳥居)}}]] '''Himekoso Shrine''' (比売許曽神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Osaka|en|Osaka|qid=Q35765|lt=Osaka City|1=Osaka}}{{ill|Higashinari-ku, Osaka|en|Higashinari-ku, Osaka|qid=Q985701|lt=Higashinari Ward|1=Higashinari-ku, Osaka}}. Its former shrine Rank was {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}}. It is one of the affiliated shrines listed in {{ill|Engi Shiki Deity List|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|lt=Shikinaisha|lt_ja=式内|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engi Shiki Deity List|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} {{ill|Myoujin Taisha|ja|名神大社|lt=Myoujin Taisha|lt_ja=名神大|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myoujin Taisha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Myōjin Taisha|qid=Q9610964}} “{{ill|Settsu Province|en|Settsu Province|qid=Q864163|lt=Settsu Province|1=Settsu Province}}{{ill|Higashikori District|ja|東生郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higashikori District|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東成郡|1=Higashinari district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10870274}} Himekoso Shrine (Lower Illumination Shrine)” (the other being the subordinate shrine {{ill|Kōzu-gū|en|Kōzu-gū|qid=Q11671792|lt=Takatsumiya|1=Kōzu-gū}} – {{ill|Himekoso Shrine (Ancient)|ja|比売古曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine (Ancient)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135578922|1=Himekoso Shrine (Ancient)}}). == {{nihongo|Worshipped deities|祭神|Saijin}} == * 主祭神 – {{ill|Shitateruhime|ja|シタテルヒメ|lt=Lower Illumination Hime|lt_ja=下照比売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitateruhime|qq=}} * 配祀神 – {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|en|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|Ajisukitakahikone|en|Ajisukitakahikone|qid=Q506610|lt=Ajisukitakahikone|1=Ajisukitakahikone}}, {{ill|Oohashikou|ja|大小橋命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oohashikou|1=Ōbashi no Mikoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q99517235}}, {{ill|Emperor Nintoku|en|Emperor Nintoku|qid=Q313119|lt=Emperor Nintoku|1=Emperor Nintoku}}, {{ill|Tachibana Toyohinode|ja|橘豊日命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Toyohinode|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == History == According to shrine tradition, in the 2nd year of {{ill|Emperor Suinin|en|Emperor Suinin|qid=Q314850|lt=Emperor Suinin|1=Emperor Suinin}} in July, at Akumeyama (あくめやま, presently the elevated area of {{ill|Tennōji-ku, Osaka|en|Tennōji-ku, Osaka|qid=Q490592|lt=Tennoji Ward|1=Tennōji-ku, Osaka}} and {{ill|Kobashicho|ja|小橋町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kobashicho|1=obasechou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q97376559}}), the deity {{ill|Shitateruhime|ja|シタテルヒメ|lt=Lower Illumination Hime|lt_ja=下照比売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitateruhime|qq=}} was enshrined,[https://www.city.osaka.lg.jp/higashinari/page/0000588014.html {{ill|Higashinari Ward Homepage|ja|東成区ホームページ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higashinari Ward Homepage|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} Himekoso Shrine] and it is said that the shrine was originally called {{ill|Takatsutenjin|ja|高津天神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takatsutenjin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. It is further said that a shrine building was constructed during the reign of {{ill|Emperor Kenzō|en|Emperor Kenzō|qid=Q360966|lt=Emperor Kenzō|1=Emperor Kenzō}}. In the {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|qid=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}}, it is recorded that {{ill|Agaru Himekami|ja|阿加流比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agaru Himekami|1=Akaruhime-no-Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q555212}} from {{ill|Silla|en|Silla|qid=Q28456|lt=Silla|1=Silla}} came to sit at the shrine of {{ill|Himegoso Shrine|ja|比売碁曽の社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himegoso Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in {{ill|Namba|en|Namba|qid=Q1075406|lt=Namba|1=Namba}}, and a similar account is found in the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|qid=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki|1=Nihon Shoki}}. However, in the {{ill|Engi Shiki Deity List|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engi Shiki Deity List|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, the Lower Illumination Shrine is identified as Himekoso Shrine,{{ill|Kotobank Himekoso|ja|コトバンク ヒメコソ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotobank Himekoso|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} while the shrine enshrining {{ill|Agaru Hime|ja|阿加流比売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agaru Hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – {{ill|Akatome Hime Shrine|ja|赤留比売神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akatome Hime Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – is recorded as being in {{ill|Sumiyoshi District|ja|住吉郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi District|1=Sumiyoshi district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10885872}}. During the {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|qid=Q193292|lt=Heian Period|1=Heian period}}, the {{ill|Engi Shiki Deity List|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engi Shiki Deity List|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} lists it under {{ill|Myoujin Taisha|ja|名神大社|lt=Myoujin Taisha|lt_ja=名神大|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myoujin Taisha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Myōjin Taisha|qid=Q9610964}}, and it is recorded that offerings made at the Niiname-sai were received there. It is presumed that the site on which our Keigai-Massha and {{ill|Umayu Inari Shrine|ja|産湯稲荷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umayu Inari Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} now stand was occupied during that era. During the {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} (1573 – 1592), the shrine building was burned down in the course of the attack led by {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} against {{ill|Ishiyama Hongan-ji|en|Ishiyama Hongan-ji|qid=Q1098123|lt=Osaka Hongan-ji|1=Ishiyama Hongan-ji}} ({{ill|Ishiyama Hongan-ji War|en|Ishiyama Hongan-ji War|qid=Q859815|lt=Ishiyama War|1=Ishiyama Hongan-ji War}}). According to tradition, the sacred object ({{ill|Shintai|en|Shintai|qid=Q327532|lt=Shintai|1=Shintai}}) of Himekoso Shrine that escaped the conflagration was transferred to the main hall of the subordinate shrine {{ill|Gozu Tennō|en|Gozu Tennō|qid=Q11570247|lt=Gozu Tennō|1=Gozu Tennō}}, located in a detached part of the shrine precincts. However, it is unclear whether this account is factual. Thereafter, the shrine separated from its subordinate branch and became known as Ushiwatennō Shrine, with {{ill|Gozu Tennō|en|Gozu Tennō|qid=Q11570247|lt=Gozu Tennō|1=Gozu Tennō}} enshrined as its principal deity. Subsequently the site of Himekoso Shrine fell into ruin and even the location of its main hall became unknown. However, in the 8th year of the {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|qid=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei Period|1=Tenmei}} (1788), someone claimed to have discovered ancient sacred treasures of Himekoso Shrine, and based on that the shrine’s legend was compiled – assigning the identity of Shikinaisha/Himekoso Shrine to the existing Ushiwatennō Shrine and enshrining {{ill|Shitateruhime|ja|シタテルヒメ|lt=Lower Illumination Hime|lt_ja=下照比売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitateruhime|qq=}} as its principal deity, with our shrine subsequently changing its name from Ushiwatennō Shrine to Himekoso Shrine, thereby being restored. However, the {{ill|Osaka Prefecture Shrine History Materials|ja|大阪府神社史資料|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Prefecture Shrine History Materials|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} record that this legend “is not to be trusted.” In 1872 (the 5th year of the {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}}), it was classified as a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}}. == Shrine Grounds == * Main Hall * Offering Hall * Worship Hall * Storehouse * Shrine Office === Subsidiary Shrines === * Shiratama {{ill|Inari Shrine|ja|稲荷社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 稲荷神社|1=Inari shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q514480}} * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|en|Ōkuninushi|qid=Q276944|lt=Ōkuninushi|1=Ōkuninushi}} Shrine * {{ill|Outside Shrine|ja|境外社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Outside Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社|1=Setsumatsusha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1071160}} ** {{ill|Umayu Inari Shrine|ja|産湯稲荷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umayu Inari Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – it is said to be located on the site once occupied by Himekoso Shrine. == Cultural Properties == === Osaka City Designated Tangible Cultural Properties === * Himekoso Shrine Documents (52 items) == Location == * {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}{{ill|Osaka|en|Osaka|qid=Q35765|lt=Osaka City|1=Osaka}}{{ill|Higashinari-ku, Osaka|en|Higashinari-ku, Osaka|qid=Q985701|lt=Higashinari Ward|1=Higashinari-ku, Osaka}}{{ill|Higashikobashi|ja|東小橋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higashikobashi|1=Higashi-obase|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q75223436}}3丁目8-14 == Access == * From {{ill|Tsuruhashi Station|en|Tsuruhashi Station|qid=Q1131704|lt=Tsuruhashi Station|1=Tsuruhashi Station}}, approximately 7 minutes on foot via {{ill|Kintetsu Railway|en|Kintetsu Railway|qid=Q1531085|lt=Kintetsu|1=Kintetsu Railway}}, {{ill|Osaka Line|en|Osaka Line|qid=Q1052545|lt=Osaka Line|1=Osaka Line}}, {{ill|Kintetsu Namba Line|ja|近鉄難波線|lt=Namba Line|lt_ja=難波線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kintetsu Namba Line|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Kintetsu Namba Line|qid=Q2491053}}, {{ill|Nara Line (Kintetsu)|en|Nara Line (Kintetsu)|qid=Q692386|lt=Nara Line|1=Nara Line (Kintetsu)}}, {{ill|West Japan Railway Company|en|West Japan Railway Company|qid=Q502125|lt=JR|1=West Japan Railway Company}}, {{ill|Osaka Loop Line|en|Osaka Loop Line|qid=Q1142127|lt=Osaka Loop Line|1=Osaka Loop Line}}, {{ill|Osaka Metro|en|Osaka Metro|qid=Q51211653|lt=Osaka Metro|1=Osaka Metro (company)}}, and {{ill|Sennichimae Line|en|Sennichimae Line|qid=Q1073354|lt=Sennichimae Line|1=Sennichimae Line}}. == References == {{Citation Help}} === Notes === {{Notelist2}} === Sources === {{Reflist|2}} === Related Articles ===
